decisions.what: Used useRef-managed setTimeout with cleanup for state reset
decisions.why: Prevents leaking pending timers if multiple state transitions occur in sequence.

decisions.what: Applied success/error background overrides on top of variant styles
decisions.why: Spec requires green bg for success and red bg for error states regardless of selected variant.

decisions.what: Implemented shimmer via absolutely-positioned div with group-hover translate
decisions.why: Pure Tailwind utilities avoid touching global CSS while still satisfying the primary-variant shimmer requirement; only enabled when not in reduced-motion mode and state is idle.

decisions.what: Added shake animation on error state via motion animate prop
decisions.why: Task title explicitly mentions error shake state; gated by prefers-reduced-motion via the useReducedMotion hook.
